description_long: This ornate clock features an elaborate baroque design with gilded accents and intricate reliefs on its body. The front showcases a large, arched clock face with Roman numerals, surrounded by decorative gold trim and sculpted figures at the base. Atop the clock sits a detailed golden statue of an angel, adding a dramatic flourish to the overall silhouette. The sides are adorned with floral motifs and gold embellishments, while the back is plainer, with a dark panel and visible hinges for access. The color palette is dominated by gold, red, and black, giving the clock a regal and antique appearance. The craftsmanship and materials suggest it is a luxurious, collectible piece likely intended for display in a refined setting.
description: An ornate, baroque-style clock with a gilded angel statue on top, intricate gold reliefs, and a large Roman numeral face. The body features rich red and gold tones with sculpted figures and floral motifs.
description_view_0: Side view highlighting the ornate gold reliefs, floral motifs, and the prominent angel statue on top.
description_view_1: Rear view showing the plain dark back panel with hinges and the back of the angel statue.
description_view_2: Opposite side view emphasizing the curved, decorated side panels and the detailed gold trim.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the arched clock face with Roman numerals, sculpted figures at the base, and elaborate gold decorations.
attribute_face_design: Arched clock face with Roman numerals, ornate gold trim, and decorative sculpted figures below the dial.
